description: Vent-hood IAQ. Trend charts above the fold; current-readings snapshot in a collapsible row below. Tag dimensions: project / position / device_id / fw. See hardware/SENSOR_PLATFORM.md.
title: Vent Hood IAQ

panels.title: CO₂
panels.description: Both sensor types overlaid. Persistent offset between SEN66 and SCD41 at the same position = drift.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2_ppm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> rename(columns: {_measurement: "sensor"})
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "sensor", "device_id"])
  |> group(columns: ["sensor", "device_id"])

panels.title: PM size distribution
panels.description: PM1.0 / 2.5 / 4.0 / 10 overlaid per device. Spread between traces is itself diagnostic — coarse fractions filter out first. PM2.5 traces highlighted in bold purple as the headline health metric.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sen66")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pm1_0" or r._field == "pm2_5" or r._field == "pm4_0" or r._field == "pm10")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> rename(columns: {_field: "metric"})
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "metric", "device_id"])
  |> group(columns: ["metric", "device_id"])

from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> rename(columns: {_measurement: "sensor"})
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "sensor", "device_id"])
  |> group(columns: ["sensor", "device_id"])

from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity_rh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> rename(columns: {_measurement: "sensor"})
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "sensor", "device_id"])
  |> group(columns: ["sensor", "device_id"])

from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sen66" and r._field == "voc_index")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "device_id"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_id"])

from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sen66" and r._field == "nox_index")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "device_id"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_id"])

from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure_hpa")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "device_id"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_id"])

panels.title: Devices — last seen
panels.description: One row per (device, sensor type). 'Last seen' > 30 s ago with a 5 s publish cadence = the device is probably offline. Use this table to look up which sensor sits behind each device column in the Snapshot table.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "uptime_s")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_measurement", "device_id", "position", "fw"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["position", "device_id"])

panels.title: Filter efficiency — PM2.5
panels.description: (intake − exhaust) / intake · 100, computed on the last ~2 minutes of 30-second-aggregated PM2.5 from SEN66 at position=intake vs position=exhaust. Reads 'awaiting exhaust sensor' until both an intake and exhaust SEN66 are publishing concurrently. Green >80 % = filter doing its job; orange 30–60 % = noticeable loading or bypass; red <30 % = filter failing, bypassed, or exhaust momentarily exceeds intake (e.g., post-cooking when stale exhaust air clears more slowly than fresh intake).

targets.query:
intake = from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sen66" and r._field == "pm2_5")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}" and r.position == "intake")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "intake"})

exhaust = from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sen66" and r._field == "pm2_5")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}" and r.position == "exhaust")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "exhaust"})

join(tables: {i: intake, e: exhaust}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r.intake > 0.0 then (r.intake - r.exhaust) / r.intake * 100.0 else float(v: 0)}))
  |> last()

panels.title: Snapshot — metric × device
panels.description: One row per metric, one column per device. Each cell is the latest value from whichever sensor that device runs (see Devices table above for the device → sensor mapping). Empty cell = device doesn't measure that quantity.

targets.query:
import "dict"

labels = dict.fromList(pairs: [
  {key: "co2_ppm",       value: "CO₂ (ppm)"},
  {key: "pm1_0",         value: "PM 1.0 (µg/m³)"},
  {key: "pm2_5",         value: "PM 2.5 (µg/m³)"},
  {key: "pm4_0",         value: "PM 4.0 (µg/m³)"},
  {key: "pm10",          value: "PM 10 (µg/m³)"},
  {key: "voc_index",     value: "VOC index"},
  {key: "nox_index",     value: "NOx index"},
  {key: "temperature_c", value: "Temperature (°C)"},
  {key: "humidity_rh",   value: "Humidity (%RH)"},
  {key: "pressure_hpa",  value: "Pressure (hPa)"},
])

sortKey = dict.fromList(pairs: [
  {key: "co2_ppm",       value: 1},
  {key: "pm1_0",         value: 2},
  {key: "pm2_5",         value: 3},
  {key: "pm4_0",         value: 4},
  {key: "pm10",          value: 5},
  {key: "voc_index",     value: 6},
  {key: "nox_index",     value: 7},
  {key: "temperature_c", value: 8},
  {key: "humidity_rh",   value: 9},
  {key: "pressure_hpa",  value: 10},
])

from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._field == "co2_ppm"       or r._field == "pm1_0"       or r._field == "pm2_5"
      or r._field == "pm4_0"      or r._field == "pm10"
      or r._field == "voc_index"  or r._field == "nox_index"
      or r._field == "temperature_c" or r._field == "humidity_rh"
      or r._field == "pressure_hpa")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_field", "_value", "device_id"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      Metric: dict.get(dict: labels, key: r._field, default: r._field),
      _sort:  dict.get(dict: sortKey, key: r._field, default: 99),
      _value: r._value,
      device_id: r.device_id,
    }))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_sort", "Metric"], columnKey: ["device_id"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_sort"])

panels.title: Hero stats — current readings (collapsed by default)
CO₂
panels.description: Latest CO₂. ASHRAE comfort tiers (<800 / <1200 / <1500 ppm).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2_ppm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> last() |> group() |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: PM2.5
panels.description: Latest PM2.5 across selected sensors. EPA AQI breakpoints (12/35/55 µg/m³).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sen66" and r._field == "pm2_5")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> last() |> group() |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: VOC index
panels.description: Sensirion VOC index. 100 = recent baseline; higher = more volatiles.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sen66" and r._field == "voc_index")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> last() |> group() |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: NOx index
panels.description: Sensirion NOx index. 1 = baseline; spikes = combustion events.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "timeseries")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> last() |> group() |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "timeseries")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity_rh")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position =~ /${position:regex}/ and r.device_id =~ /${device_id:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
